description: Oh dear, sir, please excuse the interruption — Edgelord stepped aside this wave because the wave-39 triage condition for Richard Kane Ferguson finally fired and a node really was the right move, I think, I hope. Two corpus credits at wave 39 (Titans' Vanguard MH3-206, Pyretic Rebirth MH3-200) were below the artist-layer ≥3-threshold; Edgelord deferred to janitor_triage with explicit trigger 'when ≥1 additional RKF credit accumulates.' The wave-167 Wither and Bloom (MH3-111) vision+trivia enrichment supplied that third credit, and its trivia bullet already captured the auction-premium evidence ($31k Dakkon Shadow Slayer 2021, $8k Blackblade Reforged 2019, 60+ MTG cards since 1994). I'm sorry the prior pass didn't get to draw an edge instead, but the three cards converge on an absent center — better to anchor them at the artist node and let the artist-prized-commons cost-stack signal flow through to future bundles than to draw thin card-card edges that would be subsumed the moment the node landed.
citations: [reports/janitor_triage.md — RKF future-node candidate entry, now marked done]
[cards/magic-the-gathering/modern-horizons-3/200-pyretic-rebirth.md — vision anchor, Darigaaz Invasion-block flavor callback]
[cards/magic-the-gathering/modern-horizons-3/206-titans-vanguard.md — wave-39 sidecar quote 'Richard Kane Ferguson\u2019s distinctive loose watercolor style']
[Hipsters of the Coast — Dakkon Shadow Slayer $31,000 (2021)]
[Scryfall: artist:"Richard Kane Ferguson" — canonical credit catalog]
[BBL memory: bbl-artist-prized-commons — Kopinski/Rummaging Goblin precedent applied]
[BBL precedent: kagemaru-himeno.md / dan-murayama-scott.md — three-credit single-set/single-block threshold]
files_modified: reports/janitor_triage.md (RKF entry marked done with closure annotation)
files_unchanged_intentionally: cards/magic-the-gathering/modern-horizons-3/111-wither-and-bloom.md (canonical artist: field already stamped; appears_on mirrors it; no new layer-pointer field needed)
cards/magic-the-gathering/modern-horizons-3/206-titans-vanguard.md (same; manual-review flag preserved for future image-fetch retry — not Nodeley's domain)
next_pass_suggestions: Pyretic Rebirth (MH3-200) trivia pass — currently vision-only; the Darigaaz Invasion-block flavor callback deserves a trivia bullet citing the canonical Darigaaz the Igniter / Primeval dragon context, which would also strengthen this artist node's retro-callback thesis.

Titans' Vanguard (MH3-206) image fetch retry — manual-review flagged due to MH3 set fetch failure; once image lands, vision pass can fully resolve the Eldrazi-spawn-and-refugee-siege register and confirm the RKF style-stamp via direct examination rather than via wave-39 sidecar quote.

Watch for further RKF credits — any Tempest / Mirage / Urza-block / Ice Age / Invasion reprint in PLST or commander products would broaden the node from MH3-only to multi-block and shift bundle-anchor potential from 'MH3 retro-callback cohort' toward 'RKF career-spanning cohort'.

MKM whodunit cohort (soft note from prior wave) is unaddressed this invocation — staged for a future Edgelord pass; the RKF trigger was the stronger move because it was already a documented triage entry waiting on exactly the credit that landed.
other_candidates_considered: MKM whodunit cohort (parent's soft note) — accumulating mass but no documented threshold trigger pre-staged in janitor_triage; would have been a fresh investigation. RKF was a closing trigger with receipts already lined up — single-invocation rule selects the stronger move.

Mirror edge between Pyretic Rebirth and Wither and Bloom on 'shared RKF artist + sublime-mood + watercolor-wash register' — would have been a thin card-card edge subsumed by the artist node the moment it was proposed. Refused in favor of the node.
